videos.headline: Highlight: Arch Manning shows out in No. 17 Texas' win over Arkansas
videos.description: DeAndre Moore Jr. records three TDs on three catches as Arch Manning throws for 389 yards and four passing TDs and grabs a receiving TD in the Longhorns' 52-37 win vs. the Razorbacks.

videos.headline: Steve Sarkisian emphasizes No. 17 Texas competing after win vs. Arkansas
